title: Near-miss slip on wet warehouse floor (aisle B)
description: A contractor reported a near-miss after nearly slipping on a wet section of warehouse floor. No injury. Source of water was a leaking cold-store door seal (per verbal report — requires human verification).
immediate_actions_taken: Maintenance notified of cold-store door seal
control_gaps_identified: No scheduled visual check for cold-store door seals in daily open checklist (Unknown — requires human review)
recommended_next_steps: Repair or replace cold-store door seal
Add seal inspection to daily warehouse open checklist
